core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Technical Dashboard precision with Gamer aesthetics.
Emotion First: The UI should feel 'Pro' and 'Reliable'.
Content is King: Data density without clutter.
Negative Space: Use padding to separate complex form groups.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in dark mode.

buttons.primary: bg-[#5865F2] hover:bg-[#4752c4] text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-[#4f545c] hover:bg-[#5d6269] text-white px-4 py-2 rounded transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-[#ED4245] hover:bg-[#c03537] text-white px-4 py-2 rounded transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-[#36393f] text-[#dcddde] px-4 py-2 rounded transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-[#202225] border border-[#202225] text-[#dcddde] rounded px-3 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#5865F2] focus:outline-none placeholder-[#72767d]
inputs.label_style: block mb-2 text-xs font-bold text-[#b9bbbe] uppercase tracking-wide

tables.header: text-xs font-bold text-[#b9bbbe] uppercase tracking-wide border-b border-[#202225] pb-2

status_badges.online: bg-[#3BA55C] text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-bold
status_badges.offline: bg-[#747f8d] text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-bold
status_badges.streaming: bg-[#5865F2] text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-bold animate-pulse
status_badges.error: bg-[#ED4245] text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-bold

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPERATIVE: The entire UI must be in GERMAN language (labels, buttons, messages).
Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Dashboard Overview as defined in layout_structure.
Implement the 'Dark Mode' using the provided hex codes. Do NOT use Tailwind's default slate/gray colors. Use the specific custom colors.
For the 'Stream Preset' form, use a 'Tabs' or 'Accordion' component to group fields (General, Video, Audio, Advanced) to avoid a long scrolling form.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (Success, Error, Info).
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
The 'Manual Start' widget should be prominent on the Dashboard.
Use 'recharts' for any future analytics, styled with the custom theme colors.

do_not: DO NOT use gradients for text.
DO NOT use generic centered layouts.
must_do: MUST use 'JetBrains Mono' for logs and technical data (IDs, Bitrates).
MUST implement proper loading states (skeletons) for data fetching.
